title: Třebovka

infobox.value: is a [river](/wiki/River "River") in the [Czech Republic](/wiki/Czech_Republic "Czech Republic"), a left [tributary](/wiki/Tributary "Tributary") of the [Tichá Orlice](/wiki/Tich%C3%A1_Orlice "Tichá Orlice") River. It flows through the [Pardubice Region](/wiki/Pardubice_Region "Pardubice Region"). It is 41.2 km (25.6 mi) long.
["The Mirror of History"](https://www.ceska-trebova.cz/en/vismo/dokumenty2.asp?id_org=101061&id=1006&p1=1007). Město Česká Třebová. Retrieved 2024-12-31.

["Vodní toky"](https://mapy.chmi.cz/ords/chmi_app/r/fewshlprf/stream-list?). *Evidence hlásných profilů* (in Czech). [Czech Hydrometeorological Institute](/wiki/Czech_Hydrometeorological_Institute "Czech Hydrometeorological Institute"). Retrieved 2024-12-31.

The **Třebovka** is a [river](/wiki/River "River") in the [Czech Republic](/wiki/Czech_Republic "Czech Republic"), a left [tributary](/wiki/Tributary "Tributary") of the [Tichá Orlice](/wiki/Tich%C3%A1_Orlice "Tichá Orlice") River. It flows through the [Pardubice Region](/wiki/Pardubice_Region "Pardubice Region"). It is 41.2 km (25.6 mi) long.

## Etymology

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=T%C5%99ebovka&action=edit&section=1 "Edit section: Etymology")]

The name is derived from the old Czech verb *triebiti*, which meant 'chop down', 'clear'. The name refers to the founding of settlements on the site of forest that had to be cut down first. First the name of the Třebovka river was created, then it was transferred to the settlements along the river ([Třebovice](/wiki/T%C5%99ebovice "Třebovice"), [Česká Třebová](/wiki/%C4%8Cesk%C3%A1_T%C5%99ebov%C3%A1 "Česká Třebová"), [Dlouhá Třebová](/wiki/Dlouh%C3%A1_T%C5%99ebov%C3%A1 "Dlouhá Třebová")).[[1]](#cite_note-1)

## Characteristic

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=T%C5%99ebovka&action=edit&section=2 "Edit section: Characteristic")]

[![](//upload.wikimedia.org/wikipedia/commons/thumb/f/f0/%C4%8Cesk%C3%A1_T%C5%99ebov%C3%A1%2C_T%C5%99ebovka%2C_Z%C3%A1most%C3%AD_a_n%C3%A1b%C5%99e%C5%BE%C3%AD_M%C3%ADru%2C_z_mostu_Lidick%C3%A9_ulice.jpg/250px-%C4%8Cesk%C3%A1_T%C5%99ebov%C3%A1%2C_T%C5%99ebovka%2C_Z%C3%A1most%C3%AD_a_n%C3%A1b%C5%99e%C5%BE%C3%AD_M%C3%ADru%2C_z_mostu_Lidick%C3%A9_ulice.jpg)](/wiki/File:%C4%8Cesk%C3%A1_T%C5%99ebov%C3%A1,_T%C5%99ebovka,_Z%C3%A1most%C3%AD_a_n%C3%A1b%C5%99e%C5%BE%C3%AD_M%C3%ADru,_z_mostu_Lidick%C3%A9_ulice.jpg)

The Třebovka in [Česká Třebová](/wiki/%C4%8Cesk%C3%A1_T%C5%99ebov%C3%A1 "Česká Třebová")

The Třebovka originates in the territory of [Koclířov](/wiki/Kocl%C3%AD%C5%99ov "Koclířov") in the [Svitavy Uplands](/wiki/Svitavy_Uplands "Svitavy Uplands") at an elevation of 572 m (1,877 ft) and flows to [Ústí nad Orlicí](/wiki/%C3%9Ast%C3%AD_nad_Orlic%C3%AD "Ústí nad Orlicí"), where it enters the Tichá Orlice River at an elevation of 321 m (1,053 ft). It is 41.2 km (25.6 mi) long. Its [drainage basin](/wiki/Drainage_basin "Drainage basin") has an area of 196.0 km2 (75.7 sq mi).[[2]](#cite_note-dibavod-2)

The average discharge at 3.4 river km, before the confluence of the Třebovka and Knapovecký potok, is 0.87 m3/s (31 cu ft/s).[[3]](#cite_note-3)

The longest tributaries of the Třebovka are:[[4]](#cite_note-4)

| Tributary | Length (km) | Side |
| --- | --- | --- |
| Mikulečský potok | 8.5 | left |
| Zádolský potok | 8.4 | left |
| Knapovecký potok | 7.4 | right |

## Course

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=T%C5%99ebovka&action=edit&section=3 "Edit section: Course")]

The river flows through the municipal territories of [Koclířov](/wiki/Kocl%C3%AD%C5%99ov "Koclířov"), [Dětřichov](/wiki/D%C4%9Bt%C5%99ichov_(Svitavy_District) "Dětřichov (Svitavy District)"), [Opatov](/wiki/Opatov_(Svitavy_District) "Opatov (Svitavy District)"), [Třebovice](/wiki/T%C5%99ebovice "Třebovice"), [Rybník](/wiki/Rybn%C3%ADk_(%C3%9Ast%C3%AD_nad_Orlic%C3%AD_District) "Rybník (Ústí nad Orlicí District)"), [Česká Třebová](/wiki/%C4%8Cesk%C3%A1_T%C5%99ebov%C3%A1 "Česká Třebová"), [Dlouhá Třebová](/wiki/Dlouh%C3%A1_T%C5%99ebov%C3%A1 "Dlouhá Třebová") and [Ústí nad Orlicí](/wiki/%C3%9Ast%C3%AD_nad_Orlic%C3%AD "Ústí nad Orlicí").

## Bodies of water

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=T%C5%99ebovka&action=edit&section=4 "Edit section: Bodies of water")]

There are 79 bodies of water in the basin area. The largest of them is the fishpond Hvězda with an area of 74.9 ha (185 acres), built directly on the Třebovka.[[2]](#cite_note-dibavod-2)

## Tourism

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=T%C5%99ebovka&action=edit&section=5 "Edit section: Tourism")]

The Třebovka is suitable for [river tourism](/wiki/Nautical_tourism "Nautical tourism") only in spring or after heavy rains. If the flow is sufficient, the navigable section is 13 km (8 mi) long and is also suitable to less experienced paddlers.[[5]](#cite_note-ct-5)

## Floods

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=T%C5%99ebovka&action=edit&section=6 "Edit section: Floods")]

The river did damage during floods in [1997](/wiki/1997_Central_European_flood "1997 Central European flood") and [2006](/wiki/2006_European_floods "2006 European floods").[[5]](#cite_note-ct-5)

## See also

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=T%C5%99ebovka&action=edit&section=7 "Edit section: See also")]
